name: Genesis HealthCare, Inc.
description: Genesis HealthCare, Inc. is a holding company that provides post-acute care services. The company, through its subsidiaries, operates skilled nursing facilities, assisted and senior living communities, and behavioral health centers. It also offers rehabilitation therapy services, including physical, occupational, and speech-language therapies, to residents and patients in its facilities and to third-party locations. Genesis HealthCare is one of the nation's largest post-acute care providers, dedicated to delivering high-quality care and improving the lives of the patients and residents it serves.
